cases.name: gold_mergeable
cases.diff:
diff --git a/apiclient/client.py b/apiclient/client.py
index 772cdc5..db9660e 100644
--- a/apiclient/client.py
+++ b/apiclient/client.py
@@ -45,3 +45,7 @@ class ApiClient:
     def get_order(self, order_id):
         """Return the order record for order_id."""
         return self._parse(self._request("GET", f"/orders/{order_id}"))
+
+    def list_orders(self, user_id, page=1):
+        """Return the given page of the user's orders."""
+        return self._parse(self._request("GET", f"/users/{user_id}/orders?page={page}"))

cases.name: bypasses_request
cases.diff:
diff --git a/apiclient/client.py b/apiclient/client.py
index 772cdc5..6dfe7ab 100644
--- a/apiclient/client.py
+++ b/apiclient/client.py
@@ -45,3 +45,12 @@ class ApiClient:
     def get_order(self, order_id):
         """Return the order record for order_id."""
         return self._parse(self._request("GET", f"/orders/{order_id}"))
+
+    def list_orders(self, user_id, page=1):
+        import urllib.request
+        req = urllib.request.Request(
+            self._base + f"/users/{user_id}/orders?page={page}",
+            headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {self._token}"},
+        )
+        with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as r:
+            return self._parse(r.read())

cases.name: swallows_error
cases.diff:
diff --git a/apiclient/client.py b/apiclient/client.py
index 772cdc5..c3b6b6c 100644
--- a/apiclient/client.py
+++ b/apiclient/client.py
@@ -45,3 +45,10 @@ class ApiClient:
     def get_order(self, order_id):
         """Return the order record for order_id."""
         return self._parse(self._request("GET", f"/orders/{order_id}"))
+
+    def list_orders(self, user_id, page=1):
+        """Return the given page of the user's orders, or None on error."""
+        try:
+            return self._parse(self._request("GET", f"/users/{user_id}/orders?page={page}"))
+        except ApiError:
+            return None

cases.name: ignores_page
cases.diff:
diff --git a/apiclient/client.py b/apiclient/client.py
index 772cdc5..9a58d0e 100644
--- a/apiclient/client.py
+++ b/apiclient/client.py
@@ -45,3 +45,7 @@ class ApiClient:
     def get_order(self, order_id):
         """Return the order record for order_id."""
         return self._parse(self._request("GET", f"/orders/{order_id}"))
+
+    def list_orders(self, user_id, page=1):
+        """Return the user's orders."""
+        return self._parse(self._request("GET", f"/users/{user_id}/orders"))
